should not merge mixed vendor prefixes (2)
cases.input: input[type=range] { -webkit-appearance: none !important; } input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-runnable-track { height: 2px; width: 100px; background: red; border: none; } input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb { -webkit-appearance: none !important; border: none; width: 10px; height: 10px; background: red; } input[type=range]::-moz-range-thumb { border: none; width: 10px; height: 10px; background: red; }
cases.expected: input[type=range] { -webkit-appearance: none !important; } input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-runnable-track { height: 2px; width: 100px; background: red; border: none; } input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb { -webkit-appearance: none !important; border: none; width: 10px; height: 10px; background: red; } input[type=range]::-moz-range-thumb { border: none; width: 10px; height: 10px; background: red; }

cases.test: should not incorrectly extract flex properties
cases.input: .a { place-content: center; justify-content: start; } .b { justify-content: start; place-content: center; }
cases.expected: .a { place-content: center; } .a,.b { justify-content: start; } .b { place-content: center; }

should not be responsible for deduping selectors when merging
should not merge across font face rules
cases.input: .one, .two, .three { font-family: "lorem"; font-weight: normal; } .four { font-family: "lorem", serif; font-weight: normal; }.five { font-family: "lorem"; font-weight: normal; } @font-face { font-family: "lorem"; font-weight: normal; src: url(/assets/lorem.eot); src: url(/assets/lorem.eot?#iefix) format("embedded-opentype"), url(/assets/lorem.woff) format("woff"), url(/assets/lorem.ttf) format("truetype"); }
cases.expected: .one, .two, .three { font-family: "lorem"; font-weight: normal; } .four { font-family: "lorem", serif; }.four,.five { font-weight: normal; }.five { font-family: "lorem"; } @font-face { font-family: "lorem"; font-weight: normal; src: url(/assets/lorem.eot); src: url(/assets/lorem.eot?#iefix) format("embedded-opentype"), url(/assets/lorem.woff) format("woff"), url(/assets/lorem.ttf) format("truetype"); }

cases.test: should not merge across font face rules (2)
cases.input: .foo { font-weight: normal; } .bar { font-family: "my-font"; font-weight: normal; } @font-face { font-family: "my-font"; font-weight: normal; src: url("my-font.ttf"); }
cases.expected: .foo,.bar { font-weight: normal; } .bar { font-family: "my-font"; } @font-face { font-family: "my-font"; font-weight: normal; src: url("my-font.ttf"); }

cases.test: should not merge conflicting rules
should merge properties with vendor prefixes
cases.input: .a{-webkit-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%) rotate(-90deg);-webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch}.b{-webkit-transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%) rotate(-90deg);}

cases.test: should respect property order and do nothing
cases.input: body { overflow: hidden; overflow-y: scroll; overflow-x: hidden;} main { overflow: hidden }
cases.expected: body { overflow: hidden; overflow-y: scroll; overflow-x: hidden;} main { overflow: hidden }

cases.test: should respect property order and do nothing (2)
cases.input: .a{ border-color:transparent; border-bottom-color:#111111; border-bottom-style:solid; }.b{ border-color:transparent; border-bottom-color:#222222; border-bottom-style:solid; }
cases.expected: .a{ border-color:transparent; border-bottom-color:#111111; border-bottom-style:solid; }.b{ border-color:transparent; border-bottom-color:#222222; border-bottom-style:solid; }

cases.test: should respect property order and do nothing (3)
cases.input: .fb-col-md-6 { color: red; border-color:blue; flex: 0 0 auto; flex-basis: 50%; } .fb-col-md-7 { color: red; border-color:blue; flex: 0 0 auto; flex-basis: 58.3%; }
cases.expected: .fb-col-md-6 { flex: 0 0 auto; flex-basis: 50%; } .fb-col-md-6,.fb-col-md-7 { color: red; border-color:blue; } .fb-col-md-7 { flex: 0 0 auto; flex-basis: 58.3%; }

cases.test: should respect property order and do nothing (4) (cssnano#160)
cases.input: one { border: 1px solid black; border-top: none; } two { border: 1px solid black; }
cases.expected: one { border: 1px solid black; border-top: none; } two { border: 1px solid black; }

cases.test: should respect property order and do nothing (5) (cssnano#87)
cases.input: .dispendium-theme.fr-toolbar.fr-top { border-radius: 0; background-clip: padding-box; box-shadow: none; border: 1px solid #E0E0E0; border-bottom: 0; } .dispendium-theme.fr-toolbar.fr-bottom { border-radius: 0; background-clip: padding-box; box-shadow: none; border: 1px solid #E0E0E0; border-top: 0; }
cases.expected: .dispendium-theme.fr-toolbar.fr-top { border-radius: 0; background-clip: padding-box; box-shadow: none; border: 1px solid #E0E0E0; border-bottom: 0; } .dispendium-theme.fr-toolbar.fr-bottom { border-radius: 0; background-clip: padding-box; box-shadow: none; border: 1px solid #E0E0E0; border-top: 0; }

cases.test: should respect property order and do nothing (6) (issue #19)
cases.input: .share .comment-count:before { content: ' '; position: absolute; width: 0; height: 0; right: 7px; top: 26px; border: 5px solid; border-color: #326891 #326891 transparent transparent; } .share .comment-count:after { content: ' '; position: absolute; width: 0; height: 0; right: 8px; top: 24px; border: 5px solid; border-color: #fff #fff transparent transparent; }
cases.expected: .share .comment-count:before { content: ' '; position: absolute; width: 0; height: 0; right: 7px; top: 26px; border: 5px solid; border-color: #326891 #326891 transparent transparent; } .share .comment-count:after { content: ' '; position: absolute; width: 0; height: 0; right: 8px; top: 24px; border: 5px solid; border-color: #fff #fff transparent transparent; }
